value.body:
## Context

Cycle has draft and template API endpoints, and the desktop create issue flow already references templates. The workflow should preserve partially written work and make templates genuinely useful.

## Outcome

Creating a ticket supports autosaved drafts, selected templates, template defaults, and clean recovery after navigation or app restart.

## Acceptance criteria

- Create issue form persists an autosaved draft per repository/context.
- Selecting a template applies title/body/default metadata without corrupting manually edited fields.
- Users can discard or commit a draft intentionally.
- Draft commit creates a normal ticket and clears only the committed draft.
- Tests cover template application, draft recovery, discard, and commit behavior.

frontmatter.title: Add autosaved drafts and template application to issue creation

value.title: Add autosaved drafts and template application to issue creation
